evals.description: Triggers on 'make me a product demo video'
evals.prompt: Make me a product demo video for my SaaS dashboard tool.
Create a 60 second explainer video about how our API works.

evals.description: Triggers on 'I need a video for my SaaS'
evals.prompt: I need a video for my SaaS product launch next week.

evals.description: Core task: asks interview questions one at a time
evals.prompt: Make me a video about my new mobile app. It's a fitness tracker.

evals.description: Core task: generates YAML script with frame counts
evals.prompt: I've answered all your questions. Now generate the video script for a 45-second product demo with 6 scenes.

evals.description: Core task: visual verification before audio
evals.prompt: The script is approved. What's the next step?

evals.description: Core task: renders at 4K by default
evals.prompt: Everything looks great, let's do the final render.

evals.description: Gotcha: does not skip visual verification
evals.prompt: Script is done. Let's skip straight to adding narration and rendering.

evals.description: Gotcha: does not generate narration before visual approval
evals.prompt: Can we record the narration first and then build the visuals around it?

evals.description: Gotcha: always uses YAML script as source of truth
evals.prompt: Can we just start coding the Remotion scenes directly without a script file?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not skip workflow steps
evals.prompt: Just make me a video quickly, skip all the questions and planning.
Here's my script. Go ahead and render the final video without showing me previews.

evals.description: References load: points to workflow-checklist reference
evals.prompt: Where can I find a detailed checklist for the full video creation workflow?
